The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\ahaqs\\OneDrive\\Documents\\p.serviceRawFile:
service: portfolio-rebalancer-api

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  region: eu-central-1
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  timeout: 30
  memorySize: 512

functions:
  api:
    handler: src/lambda.handler
    events:
      - http:
          path: /
          method: ANY
          cors: true
      - http:
          path: /{proxy+}
          method: ANY
          cors: true

plugins:
  - serverless-offline

package:
  exclude:
    - .git/**
    - docker-compose.yml
    - Dockerfile
    - .env
